identity.name: RationQueue
principles: Contrast is King: Outdoor visibility priority
Type is Interface: Numbers must be readable from 5 meters
One Action Per Screen: Reduce cognitive load
Feedback Loop: Always show 'Loading' or 'Success' clearly

spacing.container: p-4 md:p-8 max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-2xl lg:max-w-4xl

grid.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 md:h-14 text-lg font-semibold px-8 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 h-12 md:h-14 text-lg font-semibold px-8 shadow-md
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 h-12 font-medium

cards.base: bg-card border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 p-6
cards.highlight: bg-primary/5 border-2 border-primary/20 shadow-lg p-8 ring-4 ring-primary/5

inputs.default: h-14 text-lg px-4 border-2 border-input focus:border-primary focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 rounded-lg bg-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 transition-all

badges.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' library. Default size: 24px (w-6 h-6). Stroke width: 2px.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AAA standards (7:1) for main content due to outdoor usage.
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements must be at least 48x48px.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-live='polite' for the token counter updates.
accessibility.screen_readers: Token numbers must be read as digits (e.g., 'One Zero Five' not 'One Hundred Five').

universal_rules: DO NOT use gradients for text or backgrounds. Flat, high contrast colors only.
DO NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Work Sans' for headings and 'Public Sans' for body.
ALWAYS add 'data-testid' to every button, input, and key display element.
Mobile-first: Design for 360px width first, then expand.

landing.layout: Hero section with shop selector card. Minimal distractions.

live_counter.layout: Full screen focus on Current Token. List of next 3 tokens below.

admin_dashboard.layout: Dense but touch-friendly. Control panel at bottom fixed position on mobile.
